I’ll finish the interrupted check on `expandly-poster-faq-link-register-orange.png`: confirm the file exists, inspect the visual result, then update `critique.json` only if the output matches the requested clean FAQ direction.The file is present and `critique.json` is already pointing to this version. I’m opening the image directly now to catch visual issues that metadata can’t tell us, especially whether the bottom clarification really reads as one line.
The poster matches the requested source direction: cleaner FAQ layout, stronger orange in the number rail/price/CTA/corners, muted app grid, and the bottom clarification is one line. I’m not changing the file further because the current `critique.json` already points at this exact accepted version.
Done. The clean orange-toned FAQ poster is ready here:

`expandly-poster-faq-link-register-orange.png`

I checked it visually: it keeps the cleaner `faq-link-register` layout, uses orange more strongly in the number rail, promo price, CTA, and corners, and the bottom clarification is now a single line. `critique.json` already points to this version.
